description_long: This house is a large, multi-level residential building with a complex, asymmetrical layout and a mix of steeply pitched gable and hip roofs. The structure features expansive window arrangements, including large floor-to-ceiling glass panels on the main facade, and multiple smaller windows distributed across the upper and lower stories. The property is surrounded by a landscaped yard with rows of tall, slender trees and a curved garden bed near the entrance. The main entryway is accentuated by a set of steps leading up to a prominent door, flanked by large windows and sheltered by a modest overhang. There is a spacious garage attached to one side of the house, and a large patio or terrace area at the rear, likely intended for outdoor living. The overall design blends modern and traditional architectural elements, creating a visually striking and functional urban residence.
description: A large, multi-story house with steep gable and hip roofs, expansive windows, landscaped yard, and attached garage. The design combines modern and traditional elements with a prominent entryway and spacious outdoor areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large glass windows, landscaped garden, and prominent gable roofs.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the patio or terrace area, attached garage, and the arrangement of trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetrical arrangement of windows, garage doors, and the full extent of the roof structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the garage, side windows, and the landscaped yard with rows of trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and multiple smaller windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, large door, flanking windows, and a modest overhang
